title: lycopodioides balfourii
intro: Lycopodioides balfourii, also known as Balfour's Clubmoss, is a species of club moss belonging to the family Lycopodiaceae. It is a small, low-growing, evergreen plant native to the mountains of Sri Lanka. The medicinal properties of Lycopodioides balfourii include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. Its health benefits include improving respiratory health, reducing oxidative stress, and supporting immune function, and it can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use.
